name: bluebubbles
description: Use when you need to send or manage iMessages via BlueBubbles (recommended iMessage integration).
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 bluebubbles 相關工作
幫我啟用 bluebubbles 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 bluebubbles

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the bluebubbles skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
